title: rosa gallica var. centifolia
intro: Rosa gallica var. centifolia, also known as the Centifolia Rose or Cabbage Rose, is a fragrant and ornamental plant that belongs to the Rosa genus and is native to Southern Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Rosa gallica var. centifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Rosa gallica var. centifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oil is also used in perfumery and aromatherapy.
